source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国最贵药物降价140万元
topics.official_english: China's most expensive drug sees price cut of 1.4 million yuan
topics.why_hot: The significant price reduction of a life-saving drug directly impacts patient affordability and public health, sparking widespread discussion.
topics.share_angle: Explain how the price cut improves access to treatment and what it means for the pharmaceutical industry.

topics.why_hot: Cai Lei, a prominent ALS patient and advocate, inspires many with his resilience and call for rare disease research.
topics.share_angle: Highlight his advocacy for ALS research and the emotional impact of his speech.

topics.chinese_topic: 女子用AI写3000字股市谣言被罚
topics.official_english: Woman fined for using AI to write 3,000-character stock market rumor
topics.why_hot: Combines AI misuse, financial regulation, and legal consequences, raising awareness about AI-generated misinformation.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the legal and ethical implications of AI-generated fake news in financial markets.

topics.chinese_topic: 日本游客为免票全文背诵《岳阳楼记》
topics.official_english: Japanese tourist recites full text of 'Yueyang Tower' for free ticket
topics.why_hot: A cultural exchange story that highlights the appeal of Chinese classical literature and tourism.
topics.share_angle: Explore how cultural heritage can bridge international relations and boost tourism.

topics.chinese_topic: 磷酸铁锂价格翻倍 硫磺价格飙涨167%
topics.official_english: Lithium iron phosphate price doubles, sulfur price surges 167%
topics.why_hot: Rising raw material costs affect industries from batteries to agriculture, impacting consumers and supply chains.
topics.share_angle: Explain the causes and downstream effects of these price hikes on everyday products.

topics.chinese_topic: 人形机器人登山时表示想自己走
topics.official_english: Humanoid robot says it wants to walk on its own during mountain climb
topics.why_hot: A lighthearted yet thought-provoking demonstration of AI autonomy and robotics progress.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the implications of robots expressing preferences and the future of human-robot interaction.

topics.official_english: China table tennis team goes two consecutive tournaments without a title
topics.why_hot: A rare slump for the dominant Chinese table tennis team sparks discussion about competition and team dynamics.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the reasons behind the unexpected losses and what it means for the sport.

topics.chinese_topic: 三品牌再回应纸尿裤甲酰胺事件
topics.official_english: Three diaper brands respond again to formamide controversy
topics.why_hot: Consumer safety concerns over harmful chemicals in baby products drive public scrutiny and brand accountability.
topics.share_angle: Explain the health risks of formamide and how consumers can make informed choices.
